title: Equal Educational Opportunity
description: Conroe ISD is committed to providing every student with equal access to educational programs and opportunities, regardless of race, color, national origin, sex, disability, or other protected characteristics. The district works to ensure that no student faces discrimination or unfair treatment in any school-related activity or program. Parents and students can use this policy as a resource to understand their rights and the district's responsibilities when it comes to fair and equal treatment in schools.
